core_mechanism: asymptotic chi-square sampling distribution of an information-divergence (log-likelihood-ratio-type) statistic between an empirical and a reference distribution under the null hypothesis, converting the measured divergence into a threshold hypothesis test with controllable false-positive rate (Type I error) and computable detection power
brief_reason: The abstract derives statistical properties and chi-square benchmark values for the divergence measures, establishes that they follow chi-square distributions under no shift, and analyzes their Type I error control and statistical power as a detection test.
